response.global_analysis: The video is a product showcase by VTuber Vestia Zeta. The audio consists of her speaking in English, Indonesian, and Japanese over instrumental background music. No vocal music or singing is present, as confirmed by the Reference JSON. I am transcribing and translating her speech, ensuring timestamps are tightly synchronized with her vocalizations. On-screen text was used to verify the spelling of item names.
